NKJV.1: A Psalm of David. Vindicate me, O LORD, For I have walked in my integrity. I have also trusted in the LORD; I shall not slip.
NKJV.2: Examine me, O LORD, and prove me; Try my mind and my heart.
NKJV.3: For Your lovingkindness is before my eyes, And I have walked in Your truth.
NKJV.4: I have not sat with idolatrous mortals, Nor will I go in with hypocrites.
NKJV.5: I have hated the assembly of evildoers, And will not sit with the wicked.
NKJV.6: I will wash my hands in innocence; So I will go about Your altar, O LORD,
NKJV.7: That I may proclaim with the voice of thanksgiving, And tell of all Your wondrous works.
NKJV.8: LORD, I have loved the habitation of Your house, And the place where Your glory dwells.
NKJV.9: Do not gather my soul with sinners, Nor my life with bloodthirsty men,
NKJV.10: In whose hands is a sinister scheme, And whose right hand is full of bribes.
NKJV.11: But as for me, I will walk in my integrity; Redeem me and be merciful to me.
NKJV.12: My foot stands in an even place; In the congregations I will bless the LORD.

KJV.1: A Psalm of David<S>1732</S>. Judge<S>8199</S> me, O LORD<S>3068</S>; for I have walked<S>1980</S> in mine integrity<S>8537</S>: I have trusted<S>982</S> also in the LORD<S>3068</S>; therefore I shall not slide<S>4571</S>.
KJV.2: Examine<S>974</S> me, O LORD<S>3068</S>, and prove<S>5254</S> me; try<S>6884</S> my reins<S>3629</S> and my heart<S>3820</S>.
KJV.3: For thy lovingkindness<S>2617</S> is before mine eyes<S>5869</S>: and I have walked<S>1980</S> in thy truth<S>571</S>.
KJV.4: I have not sat<S>3427</S> with vain<S>7723</S> persons<S>4962</S>, neither will I go in<S>935</S> with dissemblers<S>5956</S>.
KJV.5: I have hated<S>8130</S> the congregation<S>6951</S> of evil doers<S>7489</S>; and will not sit<S>3427</S> with the wicked<S>7563</S>.
KJV.6: I will wash<S>7364</S> mine hands<S>3709</S> in innocency<S>5356</S>: so will I compass<S>5437</S> thine altar<S>4196</S>, O LORD<S>3068</S>:
KJV.7: That I may publish<S>8085</S> with the voice<S>6963</S> of thanksgiving<S>8426</S>, and tell<S>5608</S> of all thy wondrous works<S>6381</S>.
KJV.8: LORD<S>3068</S>, I have loved<S>157</S> the habitation<S>4583</S> of thy house<S>1004</S>, and the place<S>4725</S> where thine honour<S>3519</S> dwelleth<S>4908</S>. <sup>where: Heb. of the tabernacle of thy honour</sup>
KJV.9: Gather<S>622</S> not my soul<S>5315</S> with sinners<S>2400</S>, nor my life<S>2416</S> with bloody<S>1818</S> men<S>582</S>: <sup>Gather: or, Take not away</sup> <sup>bloody: Heb. men of blood</sup>
KJV.10: In whose hands<S>3027</S> is mischief<S>2154</S>, and their right hand<S>3225</S> is full<S>4390</S> of bribes<S>7810</S>. <sup>full: Heb. filled with</sup>
KJV.11: But as for me, I will walk<S>3212</S> in mine integrity<S>8537</S>: redeem<S>6299</S> me, and be merciful<S>2603</S> unto me.
KJV.12: My foot<S>7272</S> standeth<S>5975</S> in an even place<S>4334</S>: in the congregations<S>4721</S> will I bless<S>1288</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>.

ESV.1: Vindicate me, O LORD, for I have walked in my integrity, and I have trusted in the LORD without wavering.
ESV.2: Prove me, O LORD, and try me; test my heart and my mind.
ESV.3: For your steadfast love is before my eyes, and I walk in your faithfulness.
ESV.4: I do not sit with men of falsehood, nor do I consort with hypocrites.
ESV.5: I hate the assembly of evildoers, and I will not sit with the wicked.
ESV.6: I wash my hands in innocence and go around your altar, O LORD,
ESV.7: proclaiming thanksgiving aloud, and telling all your wondrous deeds.
ESV.8: O LORD, I love the habitation of your house and the place where your glory dwells.
ESV.9: Do not sweep my soul away with sinners, nor my life with bloodthirsty men,
ESV.10: in whose hands are evil devices, and whose right hands are full of bribes.
ESV.11: But as for me, I shall walk in my integrity; redeem me, and be gracious to me.
ESV.12: My foot stands on level ground; in the great assembly I will bless the LORD.

NASB.1: [A Psalm] of David. Vindicate me, O LORD, for I have walked in my integrity, And I have trusted in the LORD without wavering.
NASB.2: Examine me, O LORD, and try me; Test my mind and my heart.
NASB.3: For Your lovingkindness is before my eyes, And I have walked in Your truth.
NASB.4: I do not sit with deceitful men, Nor will I go with pretenders.
NASB.5: I hate the assembly of evildoers, And I will not sit with the wicked.
NASB.6: I shall wash my hands in innocence, And I will go about Your altar, O LORD,
NASB.7: That I may proclaim with the voice of thanksgiving And declare all Your wonders.
NASB.8: O LORD, I love the habitation of Your house And the place where Your glory dwells.
NASB.9: Do not take my soul away [along] with sinners, Nor my life with men of bloodshed,
NASB.10: In whose hands is a wicked scheme, And whose right hand is full of bribes.
NASB.11: But as for me, I shall walk in my integrity; Redeem me, and be gracious to me.
NASB.12: My foot stands on a level place; In the congregations I shall bless the LORD.

NLT.1:
Declare me innocent, O LORD,
for I have acted with integrity;
I have trusted in the LORD without wavering.
NLT.2:
Put me on trial, LORD, and cross-examine me.
Test my motives and my heart.
NLT.3:
For I am always aware of your unfailing love,
and I have lived according to your truth.
NLT.4:
I do not spend time with liars
or go along with hypocrites.
NLT.5:
I hate the gatherings of those who do evil,
and I refuse to join in with the wicked.
NLT.6:
I wash my hands to declare my innocence.
I come to your altar, O LORD,
NLT.7:
singing a song of thanksgiving
and telling of all your wonders.
NLT.8:
I love your sanctuary, LORD,
the place where your glorious presence dwells.
NLT.9:
Don’t let me suffer the fate of sinners.
Don’t condemn me along with murderers.
NLT.10:
Their hands are dirty with evil schemes,
and they constantly take bribes.
NLT.11:
But I am not like that; I live with integrity.
So redeem me and show me mercy.
NLT.12:
Now I stand on solid ground,
and I will publicly praise the LORD.

WEB.1: By David. Judge me, Yahweh, for I have walked in my integrity. I have trusted also in Yahweh without wavering.
WEB.2: Examine me, Yahweh, and prove me. Try my heart and my mind.
WEB.3: For your loving kindness is before my eyes. I have walked in your truth.
WEB.4: I have not sat with deceitful men, neither will I go in with hypocrites.
WEB.5: I hate the assembly of evildoers, and will not sit with the wicked.
WEB.6: I will wash my hands in innocence, so I will go about your altar, Yahweh;
WEB.7: that I may make the voice of thanksgiving to be heard, and tell of all your wondrous deeds.
WEB.8: Yahweh, I love the habitation of your house, the place where your glory dwells.
WEB.9: Don’t gather my soul with sinners, nor my life with bloodthirsty men;
WEB.10: in whose hands is wickedness, their right hand is full of bribes.
WEB.11: But as for me, I will walk in my integrity. Redeem me, and be merciful to me.
WEB.12: My foot stands in an even place. In the congregations I will bless Yahweh.

AMP.1:
A Psalm of David. Vindicate me, O LORD, for I have walked in my integrity;
I have [relied on and] trusted [confidently] in the LORD without wavering and I shall not slip.
AMP.2:
Examine me, O LORD, and try me;
Test my heart and my mind.
AMP.3:
For Your lovingkindness is before my eyes,
And I have walked [faithfully] in Your truth.
AMP.4:
I do not sit with deceitful or unethical or worthless men,
Nor seek companionship with pretenders (self-righteous hypocrites).
AMP.5:
I hate the company of evildoers,
And will not sit with the wicked.
AMP.6:
I will wash my hands in innocence,
And I will go about Your altar, O LORD,
AMP.7:
That I may proclaim with the voice of thanksgiving
And declare all Your wonders.
AMP.8:
O LORD, I love the habitation of Your house
And the place where Your glory dwells.
AMP.9:
Do not sweep my soul away with sinners,
Nor [sweep away] my life with men of bloodshed,
AMP.10:
In whose hands is a wicked scheme,
And whose right hand is full of bribes.
AMP.11:
But as for me, I shall walk in my integrity;
Redeem me and be merciful and gracious to me.
AMP.12:
My foot stands on a level place;
In the congregations I will bless the LORD.

MSG.1:
A David psalm
Clear my name, God;
I've kept an honest shop.
I've thrown in my lot with you, God, and
I'm not budging.
MSG.2:
Examine me, God, from head to foot,
order your battery of tests.
Make sure I'm fit
inside and out
MSG.3:
So I never lose
sight of your love,
But keep in step with you,
never missing a beat.
MSG.4:
I don't hang out with tricksters,
I don't pal around with thugs;
MSG.5:
I hate that pack of gangsters,
I don't deal with double-dealers.
MSG.6:
I scrub my hands with purest soap,
then join hands with the others in the great circle,
dancing around your altar, God,
MSG.7:
Singing God-songs at the top of my lungs,
telling God-stories.
MSG.8:
God, I love living with you;
your house glows with your glory.
MSG.9:
When it's time for spring cleaning,
don't sweep me out with the quacks and crooks,
MSG.10:
Men with bags of dirty tricks,
women with purses stuffed with bribe-money.
MSG.11:
You know I've been aboveboard with you;
now be aboveboard with me.
MSG.12:
I'm on the level with you, God;
I bless you every chance I get.

NIV.1:
Psalm 26
Of David.
Vindicate me, O Lord,
for I have led a blameless life;
I have trusted in the Lord
without wavering.
NIV.2:
Test me, O Lord, and try me,
examine my heart and my mind;
NIV.3:
for your love is ever before me,
and I walk continually in your truth.
NIV.4:
I do not sit with deceitful men,
nor do I consort with hypocrites;
NIV.5:
I abhor the assembly of evildoers
and refuse to sit with the wicked.
NIV.6:
I wash my hands in innocence,
and go about your altar, O Lord,
NIV.7:
proclaiming aloud your praise
and telling of all your wonderful deeds.
NIV.8:
I love the house where you live, O Lord,
the place where your glory dwells.
NIV.9:
Do not take away my soul along with sinners,
my life with bloodthirsty men,
NIV.10:
in whose hands are wicked schemes,
whose right hands are full of bribes.
NIV.11:
But I lead a blameless life;
redeem me and be merciful to me.
NIV.12:
My feet stand on level ground;
in the great assembly I will praise the Lord.

NRSVCE.1:
Vindicate me, O LORD,
for I have walked in my integrity,
and I have trusted in the LORD without wavering.
NRSVCE.2:
Prove me, O LORD, and try me;
test my heart and mind.
NRSVCE.3:
For your steadfast love is before my eyes,
and I walk in faithfulness to you.
NRSVCE.4:
I do not sit with the worthless,
nor do I consort with hypocrites;
NRSVCE.5:
I hate the company of evildoers,
and will not sit with the wicked.
NRSVCE.6:
I wash my hands in innocence,
and go around your altar, O LORD,
NRSVCE.7:
singing aloud a song of thanksgiving,
and telling all your wondrous deeds.
NRSVCE.8:
O LORD, I love the house in which you dwell,
and the place where your glory abides.
NRSVCE.9:
Do not sweep me away with sinners,
nor my life with the bloodthirsty,
NRSVCE.10:
those in whose hands are evil devices,
and whose right hands are full of bribes.
NRSVCE.11:
But as for me, I walk in my integrity;
redeem me, and be gracious to me.
NRSVCE.12:
My foot stands on level ground;
in the great congregation I will bless the LORD.

NET.1: Vindicate me, O LORD, for I have integrity, and I trust in the LORD without wavering.
NET.2: Examine me, O LORD, and test me! Evaluate my inner thoughts and motives!
NET.3: For I am ever aware of your faithfulness, and your loyalty continually motivates me.
NET.4: I do not associate with deceitful men, or consort with those who are dishonest.
NET.5: I hate the mob of evil men, and do not associate with the wicked.
NET.6: I maintain a pure lifestyle, so I can appear before your altar, O LORD,
NET.7: to give you thanks, and to tell about all your amazing deeds.
NET.8: O LORD, I love the temple where you live, the place where your splendor is revealed.
NET.9: Do not sweep me away with sinners, or execute me along with violent people,
NET.10: who are always ready to do wrong or offer a bribe.
NET.11: But I have integrity! Rescue me and have mercy on me!
NET.12: I am safe, and among the worshipers I will praise the LORD.
